title: kernelの要件定義について、MBPとmacminiの差分を埋めて。更に以下使用できるか検討せよ。https://developers.openai.com/codex/plugins
summary_text: Best canonical target is **`/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-prompt-launcher`**. It is already the command-surface adapter for `kernel`/`vote`, already handles prompt resolution and guard integration, and is the lowest-friction place to centralize MBP/mac mini sync for Codex home plugins + shell wrappers: - [README.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-prompt-launcher/README.md#L5) - [bin/codex-prompt-launch](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-prompt-launcher/bin/codex-prompt-launch#L23) - [bin/codex-prompt-launch](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-prompt-launcher/bin/codex-prompt-launch#L58) Concrete candidates to extend: - `codex-prompt-launcher` (primary install/sync home): [README.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-prompt-launcher/README.md) - `kernel-orchestration-tools` (contract/audit checks after sync): [check-codex-prompt-contract.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/scripts/check-codex-prompt-contract.sh#L45), [audit-live-prompts.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/audit-live-prompts.sh#L8) - `agent-orchestration` (good sync-script patterns to reuse: `--check`, dry-run, target modes): [sync-openclaw-skills.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/scripts/skills/sync-openclaw-skills.sh#L12), [sync-claude-settings.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/scripts/harness/sync-claude-settings.sh#L17), [check-kernel-vote-readiness.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/scripts/check-kernel-vote-readiness.sh#L20) Important gap found: - `fugue-orchestrator-public` expects `$HOME/bin/kernel` / `$HOME/bin/fugue` wrappers at runtime, but does not appear to own a real installer for those wrappers: [kernel-runtime-launch.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-launch.sh#L6) No files were edited.
